title: Arlong Confronts Luffy
description: On pages 6–9, arlong confronts luffy focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Usopp answer Nami’s plea and march toward Arlong Park together.
scene: On pages 6–9, arlong confronts luffy focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Usopp answer Nami’s plea and march toward Arlong Park together.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: luffy? I see... and just what the hell are you?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Heh heh, where D'ya think you're going?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We can't have you go through without talkin' to us first.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you don't hold it right there...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What does a pirate want with me?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
